headline: Sysco Reshapes Growth Story With Jetro Deal And Tech Leadership Shift
summary: Sysco (NYSE:SYY) has entered a definitive agreement to acquire Jetro Restaurant Depot, the largest US cash and carry foodservice operator. The deal combines Sysco’s broadline distribution network with Jetro’s wholesale club format focused on independent restaurants. Alongside the transaction, Sysco’s Chief Information and Digital Officer has resigned, with the company indicating the move is not tied to any disagreement. Sysco, trading at $71.16, sits at the center of the US foodservice...
